title: Emlak Konut Esenler Land Acquisition
description: Emlak Konut Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. (EKGYO) has completed the acquisition of land in Esenler, Istanbul, for a total of 2,898,003,570 TL (excluding VAT).
details: As part of its long-term growth strategy, EKGYO has finalized the purchase of land located in Esenler, Istanbul. The land acquisition, totaling 75,272.82 m², was completed under the protocol signed with the Ministry of Environment, Urbanization and Climate Change's Urban Transformation Directorate. The purchase price for the land is 2,898,003,570 TL, excluding VAT. This acquisition represents a significant investment in a new project within Istanbul.

updates.summary: Emlak Konut (EKGYO) has released a real estate appraisal report for 3 parcels of land located in Atışalanı, Esenler, Istanbul, which is related to the Esenler land acquisition project.
updates.details: The announcement concerns a real estate appraisal report prepared for 3 parcels located in Atışalanı, Esenler. This report is directly related to the existing 'Emlak Konut Esenler Land Acquisition' plan, providing an update on the valuation of the acquired land. The appraisal was conducted by Yetkin Gayrimenkul Değerleme ve Danışmanlık A.Ş. The report itself is attached to the announcement.
